view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario stress test.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario stress test.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario stress test.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior during a stress test with 1000 concurrent queue entries. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from this stress test, nor does it confirm whether the scenario behavior was supported or if a failure report was generated. As such, there is a lack of concrete evidence to assess the success or failure of this exploratory step.
